nasb.text: Then the Lord spoke to Moses and to Aaron, and gave them a charge to the sons of Israel and to Pharaoh king of Egypt, to bring the sons of Israel out of the land of Egypt.

esv.text: But the Lord spoke to Moses and Aaron and gave them a charge about the people of Israel and about Pharaoh king of Egypt: to bring the people of Israel out of the land of Egypt.

cnv.text: 耶和華吩咐摩西和亞倫，命令他們到以色列人和埃及王法老那裡去，把以色列人從埃及地領出來。

ccb.text: 耶和华吩咐摩西和亚伦回到以色列人和法老那里，要他们领以色列人离开埃及。
